entities.description: As a subsection of '2mqtt_client 案例', this section provides an example implementation of an MQTT client, detailing its structure and functionality within the broader MQTT communication protocol case study.
Refers to the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport protocol, which is the focus of the case study and is discussed in the context of client implementation.
Refers to the software component implementing the MQTT protocol, specifically the client-side functionality detailed in this section.
Refers to the illustrative implementation or demonstration of the MQTT client, which is the central focus of this section.

relations.description: The concept of 'MQTT' is a primary topic of section '2mqtt_client 案例'.
The concept of 'Client' is a primary topic of section '2mqtt_client 案例'.
The concept of '案例' is a primary topic of section '2mqtt_client 案例'.
